steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which quotation best illustrates the father's dedication and care for his lawn. The right choice must show a sustained, habitual pattern of careful attention — not just a single moment or emotional reaction.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "After some trouble [Jim's father] found the subject of the incident, the broken flower. Turning then, he saw the child lurking at the rear and scanning his countenance.": captures a single discrete moment of reaction, not a pattern of dedicated care over time. ✗
  • "[Jim's father] was shaving this lawn as if it were a priest's chin. All during the season he had worked at it in the coolness and peace of the evenings after supper. Even in the shadow of the cherry-trees the grass was strong and healthy.": provides a vivid metaphor for meticulous technique, evidence of sustained effort across an entire season, and proof of successful results — the fullest picture of dedication and care. ✓
  • "[Jim's father] paused, and with the howl of the machine no longer occupying the sense, one could hear the robins in the cherry-trees arranging their affairs.": shows a moment of rest, not the ongoing pattern of careful tending the claim requires. ✗
  • "[Jim] went on to the lawn, very slowly, and kicking wretchedly at the turf. Presently his father came along with the whirring machine, while the sweet, new grass blades spun from the knives.": focuses on Jim's feelings, not the father's habitual behavior. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
